title: Tramontina 12L Pedal Bin – Stainless Steel Rubbish Bin with Lid, Removable Inner Bucket, 25.5 cm Diameter x 40 cm Height, 94538112
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SMALL BIN FOR COMPACT SPACES: This small pedal bin fits neatly in tight spots, making it ideal as a bathroom bin, bedroom bin, or under-desk bin. It's also a great option for kitchens with limited space, or for anyone needing a discreet waste paper bin in compact areas.

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL PEDAL BIN: Made from high-quality stainless steel with a polished finish, this bin is easy to carry and move around thanks to the handle. It’s the perfect small kitchen bin, bedroom bin, or bathroom bin.

HANDS-FREE WITH PEDAL MECHANISM: Enjoy hygienic, hands-free waste disposal with a reliable pedal that’s been tested over one million times. This bin with lid helps keep odours contained, so it's great for bathrooms and toilets.

REMOVABLE INNER BUCKET AND STAY-OPEN LID: Designed for easy cleaning, this 12L bin features a removable inner bucket and a stay-open lid, making it great for changing liners, food prep, or longer tasks. These convenient features also make it an ideal bathroom bin with lid.
NON-SLIP BASE FOR STABILITY: The non-slip base keeps the bin steady and protects your floors. This high-quality rubbish bin is made in Brazil and comes with a 1-year warranty for added peace of mind.
description: Product Description Tramontina 12L Pedal Bin – Compact Stainless Steel Bin with Lid for Bathrooms, Small Kitchens and Compact Spaces The Tramontina 12-litre pedal bin is the perfect solution for waste disposal in bathrooms, bedrooms, offices, or any compact space. With its sleek stainless steel finish and minimalist design, this small bin fits effortlessly into modern interiors. Made from corrosion-resistant stainless steel, this durable bin features a smooth pedal mechanism for hands-free operation. The secure-fit lid helps contain odours, making it ideal as a bathroom bin or a small kitchen bin. For added convenience, the lid can stay open during longer tasks like cleaning or changing bin liners. This small pedal bin also includes a non-slip base to keep it stable on tile or hard floors, and a sturdy handle for easy transport. The removable inner bucket (included with the 12L, 20L and 30L models) makes emptying and cleaning quick and hassle-free. Whether you need a discreet waste paper bin or a compact and reliable rubbish bin for everyday use, Tramontina’s 12L bin delivers quality, hygiene and style. KEY FEATURES Size: 12 Litre Dimension: Ø 25.5 cm x 40 cm height Recommended bin liner: 10 - 12l Material: AISI 430 polished stainless steel Pedal touch Handle: Stainless steel Removable bucket Non-slip base Made in Brazil Tramontina 3 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 5 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 12 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 20 Litre Pedal Bin Tramontina 30 Litre Pedal Bin Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 4.3 out of 5 stars 10,402 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £33.99 £ 33 . 99 £41.99 £ 41 . 99 Capacity 3.0l 5.0l 12.0l 20.0l 30.0l Diameter Ø 17 cm Ø 20.5 cm Ø 25.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Ø 29.5 cm Height 27 cm 29 cm 40 cm 46 cm 65.5 cm Recommended bin liner 3.0l 5.0l 10 - 12l 20 - 30l 20 - 30l Removable bucket No No ✓ ✓ ✓ Product weight 0.84 kg 1.11 kg 1.97 kg 2.63 kg 3.65 kg Non-slip base ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Quality products since 1911 Founded in 1911, Tramontina started as a small iron mill in southern Brazil. The company currently has one of the largest industrial parks in Brazil with 10 factories aimed in the most varied segments – cookware, tableware, knives, barbecue grill accessories, stainless steel utensils. Tramontina has a strong presence in Brazil and has reached over 120 countries. In total, there are 15 units abroad, including a distribution center in UK. Along with the renowned dishwasher safe steak knives, Tramontina is now including some new additions to the portfolio, as coffee and tea glasses, roasting pans, kitchen utensils sets, stainless steel cookware and cutlery.
